response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON and on-screen lyrics for 'Sain wa B' and 'S'il vous President'. The video covers the chorus and verses of both songs. I have discarded unused lyrics from the Reference JSON that do not appear in this segment and ensured that all vocal bursts are tightly timed to the audio waveform without early cutoffs or merging across pauses.

subtitles.original: 私を推してくれるのなら
subtitles.english: If you will support me,

subtitles.original: 爆レスをあげる
subtitles.english: I'll give you a huge fan service!

subtitles.original: ア・ナ・タのアイドル
subtitles.english: I'm your idol!

subtitles.original: サインはB (チュッ)
subtitles.english: The sign is B! (Chu!)

subtitles.original: あいつは俺が育てたって
subtitles.english: Saying 'That guy was raised by me,'

subtitles.original: 近い将来 自慢してほしいよ
subtitles.english: I want you to brag about it in the near future.

subtitles.original: こうしちゃいられない
subtitles.english: I can't just be doing this.

subtitles.original: 君と！君と！今を！
subtitles.english: With you! With you! Right now!

subtitles.original: 楽しまなきゃ
subtitles.english: We've gotta enjoy it!

subtitles.original: 引きこもりも人見知りも
subtitles.english: Whether you're a shut-in or shy,

subtitles.original: 普段と違う顔見せてよ
subtitles.english: Show me a side of you that's different from usual.

subtitles.original: みんな兄弟 調子どうだい
subtitles.english: Everyone's a sibling, how're you doing?

subtitles.original: なりふり構わずに
subtitles.english: Without caring what you look like!

subtitles.original: 他人に笑われていても関係ない
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter if others are laughing at you.

subtitles.original: 周りがどうとかこうとか気にしない
subtitles.english: Don't worry about what those around you think.

subtitles.original: 主張強すぎ君のサイリウム
subtitles.english: Your glowstick is standing out so much.

subtitles.original: たとえ世界が私を拒んで
subtitles.english: Even if the world rejects me,

subtitles.original: ひとりぼっちを感じたとしても
subtitles.english: And even if I feel all alone...

subtitles.original: アナタが味方でいてくれたら
subtitles.english: If you're on my side,

subtitles.original: 怖いものはないよ
subtitles.english: I have nothing to fear!

subtitles.original: 見てよ 見てよ 何か始まる
subtitles.english: Look, look! Something is starting.

subtitles.original: 君との物語が
subtitles.english: Our story is beginning.

subtitles.original: ああ なんて素晴らしい景色だ
subtitles.english: Ah, what a wonderful sight!

subtitles.original: 誰が居ようが居まいが関係ない
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter who's here or not.

subtitles.original: 会場が大きい小さいとか気にしない
subtitles.english: I don't care if the venue is big or small.

subtitles.original: ちゃんと見えてる君のサイリウム
subtitles.english: I can see your glowstick perfectly.

subtitles.original: 今はフッと吹けば飛ぶような
subtitles.english: Right now, I'm like something fragile,

subtitles.original: 小さな小さな才能だけど
subtitles.english: A tiny, tiny talent, but...

subtitles.original: 私を推してくれるのなら
subtitles.english: If you will support me...

subtitles.original: アナタが味方でいてくれたら
subtitles.english: If you're on my side,

subtitles.original: 爆レスをあげる
subtitles.english: I'll give you a huge fan service!

subtitles.original: ア・ナ・タのアイドル
subtitles.english: I'm your idol!

subtitles.original: サインはB (チュッ)
subtitles.english: The sign is B! (Chu!)

subtitles.original: ロマンスの不祥事 逃がさない
subtitles.english: I won't let a romance scandal get away,

subtitles.original: 消してあげる
subtitles.english: I'll make it disappear for you.

subtitles.original: 宣誓！私が大統領になったら
subtitles.english: I declare! When I become the president,

subtitles.original: 人の男にちょっかいかける女は島流しにします
subtitles.english: I'll exile any woman who flirts with other men!

subtitles.original: 宣誓！私が大統領になったら
subtitles.english: I declare! When I become the president,

subtitles.original: いやただの友達だよ～ってごまかす奴はヘソから電気を流します
subtitles.english: Those who lie saying 'We're just friends' will be shocked!

subtitles.original: だ、だ、だ、大胆不敵
subtitles.english: F-f-f-fearless!

subtitles.original: センセーショナルクローズアップ
subtitles.english: Sensational close-up!

subtitles.original: D, D, D, Don't cry
subtitles.english: D, D, D, Don't cry.

subtitles.original: やるぜ徹底的にリサーチだ
subtitles.english: I'll do some thorough research!

subtitles.original: 大嫌い？ しょうがない？
subtitles.english: You hate me? Can't be helped?

subtitles.original: クズは病気ね バイバイバイ
subtitles.english: Being trash is a disease, bye-bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 権力！財産！地位名声！！
subtitles.english: Power! Wealth! Status and fame!!

subtitles.original: なんにもないけど裁きたいでしょ？
subtitles.english: I have none, but you want to judge, right?

subtitles.original: だ、だ、だ、大統領になったらね
subtitles.english: When I become the president,

subtitles.original: まずは君を捕まえるね
subtitles.english: I'll catch you first,

subtitles.original: 濡れたタオルで 洗いざらい吐かせるね
subtitles.english: And make you spit out everything with a wet towel!

subtitles.original: 誰ですか あの女
subtitles.english: Who is that woman?

subtitles.original: ダメですか そうですか
subtitles.english: Is it no good? I see.

subtitles.original: ロマンスの不祥事 逃がさない
subtitles.english: I won't let a romance scandal get away,

subtitles.original: 消してあげる
subtitles.english: I'll make it disappear for you.

subtitles.original: しる・ヴ・ぷれぷれ ぷれぜぜんと
subtitles.english: Sil-vous-pre-pre president!

subtitles.original: 宣誓！私が大統領になったら
subtitles.english: I declare! When I become the president,

subtitles.original: ただの仕事の付き合いだよ～って言う奴は二度と働けなくしてやります
subtitles.english: Those who say 'It's for work' will never work again!

subtitles.original: 宣誓！以下略！
subtitles.english: I declare! Et cetera!

subtitles.original: いや向こうが強引でさ～っていう男の口にはレジンを流し込んで固めてやります
subtitles.english: For 'pushy' men, I'll harden their mouths with resin!

subtitles.original: まるでドン・ファン気取りスキャンダラス
subtitles.english: Like a scandalous self-proclaimed Don Juan.

subtitles.original: ま、ま、ま、末端価格 甲斐性なしのスクープね
subtitles.english: F-f-f-final price, a scoop about a good-for-nothing!

subtitles.original: 愛はない？理由じゃない
subtitles.english: No love? That's no excuse.

subtitles.original: 悪くないのに はいはいはい
subtitles.english: You're not at fault? Yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: 軽薄！のうのう！厚顔無恥！！
subtitles.english: Frivolous! Carefree! Shameless!!

subtitles.original: なんにもないとかありえないでしょ？
subtitles.english: Saying you have nothing is impossible, right?

subtitles.original: だ、だ、だ、大統領になってもね
subtitles.english: Even if I become the president,

subtitles.original: たぶん君は変わらないね
subtitles.english: You probably won't change.

subtitles.original: しらっととぼけて
subtitles.english: With a blank face and playing dumb,

subtitles.original: のらりくらりかわすのね
subtitles.english: You'll dodge me elusively.

subtitles.original: デートですか こんばんは
subtitles.english: A date? Good evening.

subtitles.original: 本気ですか そうですか
subtitles.english: Are you serious? I see.

subtitles.original: 情熱とは不注意 微熱も
subtitles.english: Passion is carelessness, even a slight fever,

subtitles.original: 消してしまいたい
subtitles.english: I want to erase it all.
